mapper.select: SELECT CAST(w.ward_id AS CHAR) AS value, w.ward_name AS label FROM sys_ward w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 AND w.status = 1 ORDER BY w.sort_num ASC, w.ward_id ASC
SELECT w.ward_name FROM sys_ward w WHERE w.ward_id = #{wardId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT d.device_id FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.device_id <= #{maxAllowedId} ORDER BY d.device_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ecg_device ( device_id, device_code, device_name, device_type, device_model, manufacturer, supplier, install_date, bind_dept_id, bind_dept_name, last_maintain_time, next_maintain_time, device_status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{deviceType}, #{deviceModel}, #{manufacturer}, #{supplier}, #{installDate}, #{bindDeptId}, #{bindDeptName}, #{lastMaintainTime}, #{nextMaintainTime}, #{deviceStatus}, #{isDeleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ecg_device SET device_code = #{deviceCode}, device_name = #{deviceName}, device_type = #{deviceType}, device_model = #{deviceModel}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, supplier = #{supplier}, install_date = #{installDate}, bind_dept_id = #{bindDeptId}, bind_dept_name = #{bindDeptName}, last_maintain_time = #{lastMaintainTime}, next_maintain_time = #{nextMaintainTime}, device_status = #{deviceStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT d.device_id AS deviceId, d.device_code AS deviceCode, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.device_type AS deviceType, CASE d.device_type WHEN 1 THEN '静态心电设备' WHEN 2 THEN '动态心电设备' WHEN 3 THEN '居家监护设备' WHEN 4 THEN '床边监护仪' ELSE '未知' END AS deviceTypeText, d.device_model AS deviceModel, d.manufacturer AS manufacturer, d.supplier AS supplier, d.install_date AS installDate, d.bind_dept_id AS wardId, d.bind_dept_name AS wardName, d.device_status AS deviceStatus, CASE d.device_status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '维修' WHEN 3 THEN '停用' WHEN 4 THEN '离线' ELSE '未知' END AS deviceStatusText, d.last_maintain_time AS lastMaintainTime, d.next_maintain_time AS nextMaintainTime FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.device_id = #{deviceId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND m.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ecg_device SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT d.device_id AS deviceId, d.device_code AS deviceCode, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.device_type AS deviceType, CASE d.device_type WHEN 1 THEN '静态心电设备' WHEN 2 THEN '动态心电设备' WHEN 3 THEN '居家监护设备' WHEN 4 THEN '床边监护仪' ELSE '未知' END AS deviceTypeText, d.device_model AS deviceModel, d.manufacturer AS manufacturer, d.device_status AS deviceStatus, CASE d.device_status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '维修' WHEN 3 THEN '停用' WHEN 4 THEN '离线' ELSE '未知' END AS deviceStatusText, d.bind_dept_id AS wardId, d.bind_dept_name AS wardName, d.install_date AS installDate FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.device_id = #{deviceId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_collection_record c1 WHERE c1.device_id = #{deviceId} AND c1.is_deleted = 0 AND c1.collection_start_time >= CURDATE() AND c1.collection_start_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ) AS todayMeasureCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_collection_record c2 WHERE c2.device_id = #{deviceId} AND c2.is_deleted = 0 AND YEARWEEK(c2.collection_start_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1) ) AS weekMeasureCount, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_collection_record c3 WHERE c3.device_id = #{deviceId} AND c3.is_deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(c3.collection_start_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') ) AS monthMeasureCount, ( SELECT IFNULL( ROUND( (SUM(CASE WHEN m.monitor_status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(1), 0)) * 100, 2 ), 0 ) FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 ) AS onlineRate, ( SELECT IFNULL( ROUND( (SUM(CASE WHEN c4.ai_analysis_status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(1), 0)) * 100, 2 ), 0 ) FROM ecg_collection_record c4 WHERE c4.device_id = #{deviceId} AND c4.is_deleted = 0 ) AS errorRate

SELECT DISTINCT t.dept_name FROM ( SELECT d.bind_dept_name AS dept_name FROM ecg_device d WHERE d.device_id = #{deviceId} AND d.is_deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT c.dept_name AS dept_name FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.device_id = #{deviceId} AND c.is_deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT m.dept_name AS dept_name FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 ) t WHERE t.dept_name IS NOT NULL AND t.dept_name != '' ORDER BY t.dept_name ASC

SELECT m.patient_id AS patientId, m.patient_name AS patientName, p.inpatient_no AS inpatientNo, CONCAT(COALESCE(m.dept_name, '未知病区'), ' | ', COALESCE(m.bed_no, '--')) AS wardBed, m.current_heart_rate AS heartRate, CASE m.monitor_status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '预警' WHEN 3 THEN '离线' ELSE '未知' END AS monitorStatus, m.latest_update_time AS updateTime FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m LEFT JOIN patient_info p ON m.patient_id = p.patient_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.latest_update_time DESC, m.monitor_id DESC

SELECT r.maintain_id AS maintainId, r.maintain_type AS maintainType, r.maintain_user_name AS maintainUserName, r.maintain_time AS maintainTime, r.maintain_content AS maintainContent, r.maintain_result AS maintainResult, r.next_maintain_time AS nextMaintainTime FROM ecg_device_maintain_record r WHERE r.device_id = #{deviceId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.maintain_time DESC, r.maintain_id DESC
